title: Salesforce Adventure Club: Around the World with Young Trailblazers
author: Salesforce Careers

sections.heading: Introduction
sections.text: Calling all Trailblazers — big and small! Each year at Salesforce, we host an annual Salesforce Adventure Club: our version of “bring your kids to work day.” (After all, we want employees to be able to bring their full selves to work … and that includes their littlest ones!) This isn’t your average event; it’s a global adventure — taking place in 30+ of our offices around the worldandonline — designed to ignite curiosity, inspire creativity, and cultivate a sense of wonder in our smallest Trailblazers. With over 4,300 attendees (and counting!), let’s take a look at some of the highlights from this year’s Salesforce Adventure Club events:

sections.heading: Crafts and Cupcakes In the U.S.
sections.text: Hooray for Adventure Club! My family and I had an absolute BLAST making beeswax candles, bead necklaces, and eating some scrumptious treats. Thank you for hosting such a fun event with all the frills. We can’t wait to do it again.” Hooray for Adventure Club! sections.heading: The Fun Continued Online For Families Any Age, Anywhere!
sections.text: For employees and their families who weren’t able to attend in person, the adventure came to them! Kids of all ages could log into our interactive website to explore our Salesforce locations around the world, watch videos, play STEM-inspired games, and earn passport stamps. Ready to embark on your own adventure with Salesforce? Check out the latest Salesforcecareer opportunitiesto become part of a company that not only values your skills — but cherishes your family, too!

existing_ctas.body: Join our Talent Community and be the first to know about open roles, career tips, events happening near you, and much more.

raw_html:
Calling all Trailblazers — big and small!

Each year at Salesforce, we host an annual Salesforce Adventure Club: our version of “bring your kids to work day.” (After all, we want employees to be able to bring their full selves to work … and that includes their littlest ones!)

This isn’t your average event; it’s a global adventure — taking place in 30+ of our offices around the world and online — designed to ignite curiosity, inspire creativity, and cultivate a sense of wonder in our smallest Trailblazers.

Blaze your trail to Salesforce!

At Salesforce, we’re not just shaping the future. We’re turning big ideas into breakthroughs. Want to join the #1 AI CRM that’s leading the digital labor revolution? Explore our open roles today!

Apply now

With over 4,300 attendees (and counting!), let’s take a look at some of the highlights from this year’s Salesforce Adventure Club events:

Crafts and Cupcakes In the U.S.

Choo Choo! All Aboard the Europe Train!

Bubbles and Smiles All Over Latin America

The Fun Continued Online For Families Any Age, Anywhere!

For employees and their families who weren’t able to attend in person, the adventure came to them! Kids of all ages could log into our interactive website to explore our Salesforce locations around the world, watch videos, play STEM-inspired games, and earn passport stamps.

Ready to embark on your own adventure with Salesforce? Check out the latest Salesforce career opportunities to become part of a company that not only values your skills — but cherishes your family, too!

We can’t wait to meet you!

Join our Talent Community and be the first to know about open roles, career tips, events happening near you, and much more.

Join today
